{
 "cells": [
  {
   "cell_type": "markdown",
   "id": "3979c593",
   "metadata": {},
   "source": [
    "# Article for Journal of Open Source Software\n",
    "Martin Vonk & Aaron Peche (2026)\n",
    "\n",
    "This notebook replicates the results presented in the article submitted to the Journal of Open Source Software (JOSS). The article can be found here: https://joss.theoj.org/papers/095927c33334e8ebb4612243ea40fdae doi.org/...\n",
    "\n",
    "JOSS is a developer-friendly, open-access academic journal (ISSN 2475-9066) dedicated to research software packages and features a formal peer-review process. The pre-review and review of the Pedon package are publicly available in issues https://github.com/openjournals/joss-reviews/issues/9769 and https://github.com/openjournals/joss-reviews/issues/10409, respectively.\n",
    "\n",
    "## Setup"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "code",
   "execution_count": 1,
   "id": "906c9e13",
   "metadata": {},
   "outputs": [],
   "source": [
    "from pathlib import Path\n",
    "\n",
    "import matplotlib as mpl\n",
    "import matplotlib.pyplot as plt\n",
    "import matplotlib.ticker as mplticker\n",
    "import numpy as np\n",
    "from cycler import cycler\n",
    "\n",
    "import pedon as pe\n",
    "\n",
    "rc_params = {\n",
    "    \"axes.prop_cycle\": cycler(\n",
    "        color=[\n",
    "            \"#3f90da\",\n",
    "            \"#ffa90e\",\n",
    "            \"#bd1f01\",\n",
    "            \"#94a4a2\",\n",
    "            \"#832db6\",\n",
    "            \"#a96b59\",\n",
    "            \"#e76300\",\n",
    "            \"#b9ac70\",\n",
    "            \"#717581\",\n",
    "            \"#92dadd\",\n",
    "        ]\n",
    "    ),\n",
    "    \"axes.titlesize\": 10.0,\n",
    "    \"axes.grid\": True,\n",
    "    \"axes.labelsize\": 9.0,\n",
    "    \"xtick.labelsize\": 8.0,\n",
    "    \"ytick.labelsize\": 8.0,\n",
    "    \"legend.fontsize\": 8.0,\n",
    "    \"legend.framealpha\": 1.0,\n",
    "    \"figure.figsize\": [7.0, 6.0],\n",
    "}\n",
    "\n",
    "mpl.rcParams.update(rc_params)\n",
    "fig_path = Path.cwd().parent.parent / \"paper/figures\""
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "markdown",
   "id": "adce1604",
   "metadata": {},
   "source": [
    "## Defining a soil model"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "code",
   "execution_count": 2,
   "id": "cc2b7f28",
   "metadata": {},
   "outputs": [],
   "source": [
    "# Mualem-van Genuchten parameters for Sandy Loam\n",
    "mg = pe.Genuchten(\n",
    "    k_s=106.1,  # saturated conductivity (cm/d)\n",
    "    theta_r=0.065,  # residual water content (-)\n",
    "    theta_s=0.41,  # saturated water content (-)\n",
    "    alpha=0.075,  # shape parameter (1/cm)\n",
    "    n=1.89,  # shape parameter (-)\n",
    ")\n",
    "\n",
    "h = np.logspace(-1, 6, 8)  # pressure head (cm)\n",
    "theta = mg.theta(h)  # water content (-) at pressure head values\n",
    "k = mg.k(h)  # hydraulic conductivity (cm/d) at pressure head values"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "code",
   "execution_count": 3,
   "id": "c8e10c3c",
   "metadata": {},
   "outputs": [
    {
     "data": {
      "text/plain": [
       "array([[1.00000000e-01, 4.09984348e-01, 1.03389137e+02],\n",
       "       [1.00000000e+00, 4.08791540e-01, 8.59093947e+01],\n",
       "       [1.00000000e+01, 3.43096726e-01, 1.34676049e+01],\n",
       "       [1.00000000e+02, 1.21823289e-01, 4.55156715e-03],\n",
       "       [1.00000000e+03, 7.23953055e-02, 2.81336545e-07],\n",
       "       [1.00000000e+04, 6.59528265e-02, 1.67662224e-11],\n",
       "       [1.00000000e+05, 6.51227480e-02, 9.98706595e-16],\n",
       "       [1.00000000e+06, 6.50158130e-02, 5.94891489e-20]])"
      ]
     },
     "execution_count": 3,
     "metadata": {},
     "output_type": "execute_result"
    }
   ],
   "source": [
    "np.array(list(zip(h, theta, k)))"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "markdown",
   "id": "d4fce495",
   "metadata": {},
   "source": [
    "## Loading soil models from dataset"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "code",
   "execution_count": 4,
   "id": "952f797c",
   "metadata": {},
   "outputs": [],
   "source": [
    "hydrus = pe.Soil(\"Sand\").from_name(pe.Genuchten, source=\"HYDRUS\")\n",
    "staring = pe.Soil(\"B05\").from_name(pe.Genuchten, source=\"Staring_2018\")\n",
    "rawls = pe.Soil(\"Sand\").from_name(pe.Brooks, source=\"Rawls\")\n",
    "clapp = pe.Soil(\"Sand\").from_name(pe.Campbell, source=\"Clapp\")"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "code",
   "execution_count": 5,
   "id": "b258ae56",
   "metadata": {},
   "outputs": [
    {
     "data": {
      "image/png": "",
      "text/plain": [
       "<Figure size 260x335 with 1 Axes>"
      ]
     },
     "metadata": {},
     "output_type": "display_data"
    }
   ],
   "source": [
    "fig, ax = plt.subplots(figsize=(2.6, 3.35), layout=\"tight\")\n",
    "pe.plot.swrc(hydrus.model, label=\"HYDRUS\", ax=ax)\n",
    "pe.plot.swrc(staring.model, label=\"Staring\", ax=ax)\n",
    "pe.plot.swrc(rawls.model, label=\"Rawls\", ax=ax)\n",
    "pe.plot.swrc(clapp.model, label=\"Clapp\", ax=ax)\n",
    "ax.set_ylim(1e-1, 1e6)\n",
    "ax.set_xlim(0.0, 0.45)\n",
    "ax.set_xticks(np.arange(0.0, 0.5, 0.05), minor=True)\n",
    "ax.legend(ncol=1, loc=\"upper right\", frameon=True)\n",
    "# ax.set_title(\"Sand SWRC from different sources\")\n",
    "ax.set_ylabel(\"Pressure head |\\N{GREEK SMALL LETTER PSI}| (cm)\")\n",
    "ax.set_xlabel(\"Soil water content \\N{GREEK SMALL LETTER THETA} (-)\")\n",
    "fig.savefig(fig_path / \"dataset_swrc.png\", dpi=300, bbox_inches=\"tight\")"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "markdown",
   "id": "8119f30b",
   "metadata": {},
   "source": [
    "## Obtaining a soil model from pedotransfer function and databases "
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "code",
   "execution_count": 6,
   "id": "ef33492e",
   "metadata": {},
   "outputs": [],
   "source": [
    "# Create a soil sample with easily measured properties. Note that\n",
    "# not all pedotransfer functions require all of these properties,\n",
    "# but this is a common set that covers most cases.\n",
    "ss = pe.SoilSample(\n",
    "    sand_p=60.0,  # sand (%)\n",
    "    silt_p=30.0,  # silt (%)\n",
    "    clay_p=10.0,  # clay (%)\n",
    "    om_p=2.5,  # organic matter (%)\n",
    "    rho=1.5,  # bulk density (g/cm3)\n",
    ")\n",
    "\n",
    "# Estimate van Genuchten parameters using Wösten (HYPRES)\n",
    "wosten: pe.Genuchten = ss.wosten()\n",
    "\n",
    "# Estimate van Genuchten parameters using Rosetta v3\n",
    "# Optional dependency requiring installation of `httpx`\n",
    "rosetta: pe.Genuchten = ss.rosetta(version=3)\n",
    "\n",
    "# Estimate Brooks-Corey parameters using Saxton\n",
    "saxton: pe.Brooks = ss.saxton()"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "code",
   "execution_count": null,
   "id": "5f4ae504",
   "metadata": {},
   "outputs": [
    {
     "data": {
      "image/png": "",
      "text/plain": [
       "<Figure size 260x335 with 1 Axes>"
      ]
     },
     "metadata": {},
     "output_type": "display_data"
    }
   ],
   "source": [
    "fig, ax = plt.subplots(figsize=(2.6, 3.35), layout=\"constrained\")\n",
    "pe.plot.swrc(wosten, label=\"Wösten\", ax=ax)\n",
    "pe.plot.swrc(rosetta, label=\"Rosetta\", ax=ax)\n",
    "pe.plot.swrc(saxton, label=\"Saxton\", ax=ax)\n",
    "ax.set_ylim(1e-2, 1e6)\n",
    "ax.set_xlim(0.0, 0.46)\n",
    "ax.xaxis.set_minor_locator(mplticker.MultipleLocator(0.05))\n",
    "ax.xaxis.set_major_locator(mplticker.MultipleLocator(0.1))\n",
    "ax.legend(ncol=1, loc=\"upper right\", frameon=True)\n",
    "ax.set_ylim(1e-1, 1e6)\n",
    "# ax.set_title(\"SWRC from pedotransfer functions\")\n",
    "ax.set_ylabel(\"Pressure head |\\N{GREEK SMALL LETTER PSI}| (cm)\")\n",
    "ax.set_xlabel(\"Soil water content \\N{GREEK SMALL LETTER THETA} (-)\")\n",
    "fig.savefig(fig_path / \"ptf_swrc.png\", dpi=300, bbox_inches=\"tight\")"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "code",
   "execution_count": 8,
   "id": "95f42ef8",
   "metadata": {},
   "outputs": [],
   "source": [
    "# Estimate parameters using HYPAGS\n",
    "ks = 1e-3  # saturated hydraulic conductivity (m/s)\n",
    "hypags: pe.Genuchten = pe.SoilSample(k=ks).hypags()"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "code",
   "execution_count": 9,
   "id": "c1ee315c",
   "metadata": {},
   "outputs": [
    {
     "data": {
      "text/plain": [
       "Genuchten(k_s=0.001, theta_r=0.105, theta_s=np.float64(0.30896365527138614), alpha=np.float64(9.439965924107144), n=np.float64(1.3453214358373247), l=0.5)"
      ]
     },
     "execution_count": 9,
     "metadata": {},
     "output_type": "execute_result"
    }
   ],
   "source": [
    "# pe.plot.curves(hypags, label=\"HYPAGS\")\n",
    "hypags"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "markdown",
   "id": "732dd9ed",
   "metadata": {},
   "source": [
    "## Fitting a soil model"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "code",
   "execution_count": 10,
   "id": "6f010ea6",
   "metadata": {},
   "outputs": [],
   "source": [
    "# Fitting a Brooks-Corey soil model to existing Mualem-van Genuchten soil model\n",
    "bcf = pe.SoilSample(h=h, theta=theta, k=k).fit(pe.Brooks)"
   ]
  },
  {
   "cell_type": "code",
   "execution_count": 11,
   "id": "11e43ca7",
   "metadata": {},
   "outputs": [
    {
     "data": {
      "image/png": "",
      "text/plain": [
       "<Figure size 520x335 with 2 Axes>"
      ]
     },
     "metadata": {},
     "output_type": "display_data"
    }
   ],
   "source": [
    "fig, axes = plt.subplots(\n",
    "    ncols=2, figsize=(5.2, 3.35), layout=\"tight\", sharey=True, width_ratios=[1.0, 1.2]\n",
    ")\n",
    "axes = pe.plot.curves(mg, axes=axes, linewidth=2.0, label=\"Mualem-van Genuchten\")\n",
    "axes = pe.plot.curves(bcf, axes=axes, linewidth=1.5, label=\"Brooks-Corey fit\")\n",
    "\n",
    "axes[0].set_xlim(0.0, 0.46)\n",
    "axes[0].xaxis.set_minor_locator(mplticker.MultipleLocator(0.05))\n",
    "axes[0].xaxis.set_major_locator(mplticker.MultipleLocator(0.1))\n",
    "axes[1].set_ylim(h[0], h[-1])\n",
    "xt1 = np.logspace(-15, 3, 19)\n",
    "axes[1].set_xlim(xt1[0], xt1[-1])\n",
    "log_locator = mplticker.LogLocator(base=10.0, subs=(1.0,), numticks=20)\n",
    "axes[1].xaxis.set_minor_locator(log_locator)\n",
    "axes[1].xaxis.set_minor_formatter(mplticker.NullFormatter())\n",
    "axes[0].set_ylabel(\"Pressure head |\\N{GREEK SMALL LETTER PSI}| (cm)\")\n",
    "axes[0].set_xlabel(\"Soil water content \\N{GREEK SMALL LETTER THETA} (-)\")\n",
    "axes[1].set_ylabel(\"\")\n",
    "axes[1].set_xlabel(\"Hydraulic conductivity $K$ (cm/d)\")\n",
    "\n",
    "handles, labels = axes[0].get_legend_handles_labels()\n",
    "fig.legend(\n",
    "    handles,\n",
    "    labels,\n",
    "    bbox_to_anchor=(0.13, 0.92),\n",
    "    loc=\"lower left\",\n",
    "    ncol=2,\n",
    "    frameon=False,\n",
    ")\n",
    "fig.tight_layout(w_pad=0.1)\n",
    "fig.align_xlabels()\n",
    "fig.savefig(fig_path / \"fit_swrc_hcf.png\", dpi=300, bbox_inches=\"tight\")"
   ]
  }
 ],
